name: GaugeFlow Gate A8 explicit-time joint atom-type substrate v1
objective: Repair the time-blind original-injection vector field discovered after A7, then repeat only the valid absorbing-discrete, graph-count-constrained endpoint-ID type-set qualification.

historical_evidence_is_immutable.instruction: A/A1/A2/A3/A4/A5/A6/A7 reports, thresholds, splits, checkpoints and conclusions remain immutable. A8 is a new correction of a vector-field time-input implementation defect.

code_audit: In original_injection, time embedding previously reached only graph_query. Endpoint-ID, raw_tensor and direct_irrep encoders do not consume graph_query, so their main message-passing field was exactly time-blind for fixed state and condition.
A regression test now verifies that endpoint-ID original-injection type logits differ between t=0 and t=1 for the same masked state.

A7's composition latent made graph composition exact (1.0) but site atom accuracy remained 0.40625; this is consistent with an early all-mask posterior represented by a time-blind field, not a reason to relax A7 criteria.

literature.citation: Lipman et al., Flow Matching for Generative Modeling, 2023
literature.use: A learned vector field represents v_t(x); explicit path time is part of its input, so omitting it from the backbone is a model-definition error rather than a hyperparameter choice.

literature.citation: Gat et al., Discrete Flow Matching, 2024
literature.use: Discrete endpoint posteriors are time-dependent along a specified probability path. A8 retains A6/A7's valid absorbing DFM sampler and corrects time access in its posterior network.

joint_type_set.chemical_vocabulary: all 119 chemical elements; the DFM mask is internal and cannot occur in a composition count
joint_type_set.composition_latent: for each element k, predict count n_k in [0,N] from the graph condition and fully masked type state; decode under the exact sum_k n_k=N constraint
joint_type_set.node_transition: retain the absorbing DFM posterior and count-constrained reveal matching from A7
joint_type_set.architecture_correction: add the learned time embedding to every node before original-injection message passing; no other capacity, loss, condition, sampler, seed or budget change

endpoint_id_type_substrate.condition: two-class endpoint ID only; no tensor, orbit, oracle, target CIF, target lattice, target composition or target symmetry is passed as a condition
endpoint_id_type_substrate.note: True coordinates and lattice remain fixed solely for type-only qualification, exactly as in A4-A7.

decision_rules.pass: The type-set substrate is qualified only. Propose a separate versioned geometry-only repair; do not start tensor conditioning or joint crystal generation.
decision_rules.composition_pass_site_fail: With explicit time now fixed, audit the periodic site-assignment representation before any tensor work; do not relax composition or atom-accuracy criteria.
decision_rules.composition_fail: Audit graph-level condition access and count-posterior capacity. Do not return to independent per-node type sampling or target-specific vocabularies.
